name: 10q21_CTNNA3_SD
description: 10q21.3 segmental duplication interval inside CTNNA3 (alpha-T-catenin) overlapping the common chromosomal fragile site FRA10B. Houses LRRTM3 within a CTNNA3 intron and is enriched for short intronic SDs paired with the wider catenin family.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SDs of 5-30 kb at 90-95% identity; common fragile site FRA10D / FRA10B in vicinity; large gene body (>1.7 Mb) with multiple repeat-prone introns.
